# Sara Analysis

**Summary**: A method to determine the weight percentages of saturates, aromatics, resins, and asphaltenes.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1995-al-jaziri|Al-Jaziri, 1995]] performed SARA analysis on oil samples from Well-B.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Asphaltene content was found to be higher in samples that were harder to break (requiring more demulsifier). ([[1995-al-jaziri|Al-Jaziri, 1995, p. 85]])
